notes: Runs, but suffers from occasional crashing, particularly at the main menu or when changing video settings. Performance isn't so great; got 13 FPS on Ultra GFX settings at 1080p. Decreasing GFX to High didn't make much of a difference.
title: Cooking Simulator

notes: Runs good.  Used windowed mode and then enlarged the window.  Ran perfectly after that.  Alt tabing also worked.
title: Cooking Simulator

notes: Ran perfectly out-of-the-box. Played for 5 hours on max graphics with no notable issues. May experience framedrops from lighting effects occasionally, or object spam. Game never reached an "unplayable" state, though.
title: Cooking Simulator

notes:
Lots of issues using DXVK, including some random crashing, seemingly constant crashing on second start without deleting its directory in steamapps/compatdata.
FPS with DXVK seems to directly depend on the resolution, where it runs well (144+ fps) at 640x480 all the way down to 3 fps on 2560x1440. I was able to run it faster at 2560x1440 once when changing the graphics settings. With PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 the game runs all right at 2560x1440 with the lowest graphical settings.
title: Cooking Simulator

notes: Yeah it runs fine, haven't had any problem

notes: Constant 60 FPS without any problems. I had to use PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 with an earlier NVIDIA driver version, or else the game would freeze during the loading screen.
title: Cooking Simulator
